messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-487 — Pipeline board freshness must not depend on the coordinator remembering to run sync: recompute role-held stage from live in_process mailboxes on the concierge tick
What it solves: ORIGIN — BL-474 audit finding #1, THE architectural answer to the fragile board (BL-473 was the
render-anyway visibility patch; this is the freshness fix). Verified live 2026-07-17 ~07:59 UTC: with 6
tickets in backlog/active/, .swarmforge/board/ticket-stage-map.json held only 2, so 4 role-held tic…
Approval context: ARCHITECTURAL change to a core surface (who owns pipeline-board freshness), so flagging for review. FIRM: board freshness must recompute from live in_process mailboxes on the concierge tick, so a skipped/stale coordinator `sync` can never durably mis-stage a held ticket; `sync` becomes a cache-warm…
BL-487 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-487" (or "reject BL-487 <reason>") to act.
